repair_triggers.trigger: per-slide structural_qa or aesthetic_qa remains pending after validation
repair_triggers.recommendation: run the trace QA refresh step before scoring or winner claims

repair_triggers.trigger: selected visual production modules are recorded in trace but not visible in the contact sheet
repair_triggers.recommendation: repair the slide module or keep the rerun as data-only evidence, not visual-quality evidence

repair_triggers.trigger: selected visual production module falls back to a simpler native representation
repair_triggers.recommendation: keep release decision public_blocked and record the fallback policy in trace

repair_triggers.trigger: visible words, panels, or proof objects exceed the selected aesthetic move budget
repair_triggers.recommendation: route proof detail to notes/results or select a lower-density archetype
repair_triggers.human_gate: required before repair changes are treated as accepted

repair_triggers.trigger: PowerPoint, Keynote, or cross-platform render inspection has not passed
repair_triggers.recommendation: keep release decision public_blocked and perform manual export if automation fails

repair_triggers.trigger: outcome slide repeats setup or proof grid without a larger justified object
repair_triggers.recommendation: revise the climax archetype so the strongest supported delta gets the largest field
